title: Lack of Audit Logging
description: The system’s description doesn’t specify the level of audit logging. Without comprehensive logging of user actions, system events, and data modifications, it becomes impossible to track down malicious activity, investigate security incidents, or determine accountability. This significantly hinders forensic investigations and compliance efforts.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access, data manipulation, system compromise – actions cannot be traced back to the perpetrator.
mitigations: Implement comprehensive audit logging for all critical system events.
Securely store audit logs and regularly review them for suspicious activity.
Integrate audit logs with a Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) system.
